_comment: Exercises the cross-family flag: judge/review resolves to claude-sonnet-4-6 (family anthropic); coder_family is also anthropic, so judge family == coder family. With policy cross_family_required=false this emits an ADVISORY note (L1 isolation by rig/role/prompt) and still resolves. Expect exit 0, cross_family.applies=true, cross_family.same_family=true, cross_family_required=false.
